User.title: User
User.description: Represents the candidate's core profile and current assessment progress state.

status.description: Current overall status of the candidate's assessment.

lastSubmittedAt.description: Timestamp of final submission, if completed.

currentCategory.description: Active module category (e.g. Numerical, Verbal) if in progress.

Draft.title: Draft
Draft.description: Represents real-time candidate test answers, module timers, and tracking backups.

answers.description: Key-value map of question IDs to selected option indices.

timeLeft.description: Key-value map of module categories to seconds remaining.

activeCategory.description: The current category being actively timed, or null.

currentQuestionIndex.description: The index of the question the candidate is currently on.

updatedAt.description: Last timestamp progress draft was synced.

Result.title: Result
Result.description: Secure, graded cognitive assessment report generated exclusively by the backend service.

userDisplayName.description: Candidate's name at the time of submission.

feedback.description: Professional qualitative feedback generated by the AI grading engine.

/users/{userId}.description: Candidate profiles stored by unique user ID.

/drafts/{userId}.description: Active in-progress assessment drafts backed up in real time.
